  • Uses of ValidationResult in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan that return ValidationResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ValidationResult
    EMediplan.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanHealthcareOrganization.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanMedicament.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanMedicament.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType)
    Context-aware validation, that takes into account whether the eMediplan document is a treatment plan or a prescription.
    default ValidationResult
    EMediplanObject.validate()
    Validates the eMediplan object, without any further context than its own content, against the eMediplan specs.
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanObject.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
    Validates the eMediplan object, without any further context than its JSON path and its own content, against the eMediplan specs.
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType, Instant timestamp)
    Validates the patient object taking into account which type of eMediplan document it belongs to.
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData.validate(@Nullable String basePath, @Nullable Period age)
    Performs context-aware validation of the object, including the base context-unaware validation.
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPosology.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPostalAddress.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanRisk.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanRiskList.validate(@Nullable String basePath)
     
    protected ValidationResult
    EMediplanMedicament.validateBase(@Nullable String basePath, boolean contextAwareCaller)
     
    protected ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validateBase(@Nullable String basePath, boolean contextAwareCaller)
    Base validation that performs or skips certain validation checks depending on whether the caller is context-aware or not.
    protected ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validateEmailAddress(@Nullable String basePath, String fieldName, int index, String email)
     
    default ValidationResult
    EMediplanExtendable.validateExtensions(@Nullable String basePath)
    Validates the object extensions.
    default ValidationResult
    EMediplanHealthcareProCarrier.validateHealtcareProInfo(@Nullable String basePath)
    Validates the healthcare person and healthcare organization content.
    protected ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validatePhone(@Nullable String basePath, String fieldName, int index, String phone)

    protected void
    EPrescription.validateRev3Constraints(@Nullable String basePath, ValidationResult result)
    This method validates specific constraints added with rev3 of the eMediplan ePrescription exchange format.

    ChEmedEprHapiValidator.logValidationResult(ValidationResult validationResult)
